name: forum_replies
title: Forum Replies
description: Replies to a forum topic, with a self-referencing parent_id for threaded/nested replies -- a faithful port of the source model. "storage": "classic" (the default, spelled out here deliberately) rather than "append": unlike app-thread's thread_comments, forum replies are expected to be edited by their author after posting, which append-mode's docs/append-only-storage-design.md treats as a rewrite anyway -- classic storage matches that reality directly.

fields.name: parent_id
fields.label: In reply to
fields.help: Self-referencing parent for threaded/nested replies. Blank for a top-level reply to the topic itself.

fields.name: is_solution
fields.label: Marked as Solution
fields.help: v1 posture: a reply's author can mark their own reply as the solution (owner-write, same as every other field here). A topic owner marking someone else's reply as the solution is cross-user moderation, deferred -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.
